title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
1. A meeting of the Board of Directors of IDBI Bank Ltd. will be held on Friday, October 21, 2022, to consider and approve the Un-audited Financial Results of the Bank for the quarter & half year ended September 30, 2022.
2. Analyst/Investor meet for Q2 Financial Results for FY 2022-23
